name: KungFu VR
summary: KungFu VR is an immersive game that mixes KungFu with fitness in a way that’s fun and action-packed. You’ll train with top martial artists and learn moves like Dragon Fist, Tai Chi, and Swordsmanship, all while getting stronger, more balanced, and coordinated. so you’ll have a blast while getting fit. this game will level up your fitness routine. Ready to master Kung Fu? Download KungFu VR and start your KungFu journey now!
